name: Junior Mint Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crust ingredients. Press into the bottom and sides of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Place junior mints in the freezer.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F.
4. With an electric mixer or food processor, combine cream cheese and sugar until smooth.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Stir in vanilla.
7. Pour filling into crust.
8. Chop cold junior mints and sprinkle over cheesecake.
9. Bake for 40-45 minutes, or until just set.
10. Cool on a wire rack, then chill several hours or overnight.
11. Makes about 8 servings.
